transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-21]
[00:00] You: Executive strategy session. Q3 halfway point. Let's make sure we're on track for the year.
[00:50] Speaker 1: Revenue is tracking to plan. My concern is churn — Q2 churn rate was 3.2%, up from 2.8% in Q1. I'll present a churn analysis to the board by August 5th.
[01:35] Speaker 2: On the product side, we've shipped 8 of 12 planned features. The 4 remaining are lower priority. I'll reprioritize Q3 features and share the revised plan by July 24th.
[02:20] Speaker 3: Engineering team is at 92% capacity. We're stretched. If we want to add any unplanned work this quarter, we'd need to drop something. I'll prepare a capacity model by July 25th.
[03:00] Speaker 4: Marketing pipeline looks strong. Our content strategy is working — organic traffic up 40% YoY. I'll share the detailed attribution report in next week's staff meeting.
[03:45] Speaker 5: Customer success — NPS is 48, up from 44 last quarter. But our enterprise tier onboarding time is too long — 45 days average vs. 30-day target. I'll create a 90-day onboarding improvement plan by August 1st.
[04:30] Speaker 6: Finance — we're 4% under plan on OpEx. The underspend is in headcount. I'll update the annual forecast to reflect the current hiring pace by July 28th.
[05:10] You: One initiative I want to add: a customer advisory board. Speaker 1, can you identify 5 customers and get commitments from them?
[05:30] Speaker 1: I'll identify and reach out to 5 customers for the advisory board by August 3rd.
[06:00] Speaker 2: We also need to revisit our pricing strategy before Q4. I'll start a pricing analysis by August 10th.
